ivschat.room.CfnAbout: The `AWS::IVSChat::Room` resource specifies an Amazon IVS room that allows clients to connect and pass messages. For more information, see [CreateRoom](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/ivs/latest/ChatAPIReference/API_CreateRoom.html) in the *Amazon Interactive Video Service Chat API Reference*.

ivschat.room.LoggingConfigurationIdentif.Description: List of logging-configuration identifiers attached to the room.

ivschat.room.MaximumMessageLength.Description: Maximum number of characters in a single message. Messages are expected to be UTF-8 encoded and this limit applies specifically to rune/code-point count, not number of bytes.

ivschat.room.MaximumMessageRatePerSecond.Description: Maximum number of messages per second that can be sent to the room (by all clients).

ivschat.room.MessageReviewHandler.Description: Configuration information for optional review of messages.

ivschat.room.Name.Description: Room name. The value does not need to be unique.

ivschat.room.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
